$schema: Issue tracker for fr0ster/mcp-abap-adt — relevance to ARC-1

issues.title: The UpdateFunctionModule operation will lose FM parameters.
issues.relevance: Updating FM source via /source/main strips parameter declarations on reactivation because parameters live in a separate metadata document. ARC-1 verify: SAPWrite(type='FUNC', action='update') would hit the same bug AND has a separate broken-URL bug (objectBasePath('FUNC') returns the group path, not the fmodules path). Either fix both or remove FUNC from SAPWRITE_TYPES_ONPREM.

issues.title: Per-instance systemType option for EmbeddableMcpServer (avoid global SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE)
issues.relevance: Constructor option overrides process.env.SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE for a single embedded server instance. Resolution order: option → env → 'cloud'. Not applicable to ARC-1 (one process per system); track for any future Node SDK / embed mode.

issues.title: Add CreateProgram / UpdateProgram / DeleteProgram (classic executable reports)
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already supports PROG CRUD via SAPWrite (case 'PROG' in buildCreateXml + objectBasePath, 'PROG' in SAPWRITE_TYPES_ONPREM, ZARC1_TEST_REPORT covered in tests/e2e/fixtures.ts). Closed in favour of #69 upstream.

issues.title: Refresh dependencies and lockfile after adt-clients drops node-rfc
issues.relevance: Lockfile cleanup after their adt-clients drops node-rfc — ARC-1 doesn't use node-rfc.

issues.title: Enrich tool descriptions with related operation context
issues.relevance: RAG-driven cross-references between Create/Update/Read tool descriptions to improve vector-search ranking. Not applicable to ARC-1 (12 intent-based tools, no RAG selection); workflow-ordering polish in SAPWrite/SAPActivate descriptions remains a small DX improvement.

issues.title: Support RFC connection for all SAP systems, not just legacy
issues.relevance: RFC docs framing change — ARC-1 is HTTP-only, not relevant.

issues.title: RuntimeGetDumpById: fails to find dumps that RuntimeListFeeds returns
issues.relevance: Timezone/format mismatch in dump ID lookup: ListFeeds returns IDs like '20260415031226epbyminsd0654_E19_00' but GetDumpById with datetime+user can't match them. Root cause: datetime+user search has narrow ±60s window or timezone offset. Fixed by: BREAKING removed datetime+user params, now accepts dump_id directly. ARC-1 lesson: if adding dump ID lookup, use the feed-returned ID directly rather than datetime+user search.

issues.title: UpdateInterface fails with 'Parameter corrNr could not be found' on SAP BTP ABAP Cloud
issues.relevance: BTP Cloud has no transports — passing corrNr (even as empty/undefined) causes ExceptionParameterNotFound 400 for UpdateInterface. Fix: only include transportRequest when it has a value. ARC-1 verify: safeUpdateSource() must not include transport param when undefined on BTP.

issues.title: Update ServiceBinding handlers to use ServiceBindingVariant from adt-clients
issues.relevance: ServiceBindingVariant replaces separate binding_type/service_type. Key: V2 vs V4 variants use different publish endpoints (odatav2 vs odatav4). ARC-1 hardcodes odatav2 — fix needed for V4 bindings.

issues.title: CreateServiceBinding: add category parameter (UI vs Web API)
issues.relevance: Same as #60 — ServiceBindingVariant covers both binding type (V2/V4) and category (UI/Web API). ARC-1 CreateServiceBinding should support V4 variants.

issues.title: Update/Delete handlers don't unlock objects on failure
issues.relevance: Lock leak in Update/Delete when operation fails — identical to #57 but for more handler types. Root cause: try-finally not used. ARC-1 uses centralized safeUpdateSource() with try-finally — already protected. But verify Delete path in crud.ts also uses try-finally around lock.

issues.title: Update handlers must unlock objects in finally block on failure
issues.relevance: Same as #58 — fr0ster had lock leaks in Update handlers. ARC-1 already has try-finally via safeUpdateSource(). Validates ARC-1's centralized lock management.

issues.title: Missing Content-Type header in BehaviorDefinition lock request
issues.relevance: BDEF lock requires Content-Type header — omitting it causes 415. ARC-1 verify: lockObject() in crud.ts for BDEF sets correct Content-Type on the lock POST request.

issues.title: CSRF 403 on UpdateBehaviorDefinition LOCK via BTP Destination
issues.relevance: CSRF token 403 when using BTP Destination Service — related to #45 (CSRF cookie corruption). ARC-1's CSRF handling via http.ts auto-refreshes on 403 — should be covered.

issues.title: Add Check tools for ABAP objects (syntax/semantic validation)
issues.relevance: 13 per-type Check handlers added. ARC-1 already has unified syntax_check via SAPDiagnose — no action.

issues.title: ActivateObjects fails with CSRF 403 on on-premise via BTP Destination
issues.relevance: Same CSRF 403 pattern as #55 but for activation. ARC-1 http.ts handles CSRF retry — should be covered.

issues.title: UpdateView/CreateView: support skipSyntaxCheck for CDS with circular dependencies
issues.relevance: CDS views with circular associations fail syntax check at save time. skipSyntaxCheck=true bypasses check. ARC-1 SAPWrite CDS path: verify syntax check can be skipped for circular CDS.

issues.title: Missing ActivateObject tool for group/mass activation
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has batch_activate via SAPActivate.

issues.title: CreateDomain does not activate created domains on on-premise
issues.relevance: Their create handler didn't wait before activation — not relevant to ARC-1 flow.

issues.title: Stdio mode: log output leaks into stdio transport channel
issues.relevance: ARC-1 uses stderr-only logger — not affected.

issues.title: CSRF token errors when creating multiple objects in sequence
issues.relevance: ARC-1 uses withStatefulSession() for isolation — already protected.

issues.title: Export resolveSystemContext from public API
issues.relevance: Internal API export — not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: DefaultPipeline ignores externalTools from options
issues.relevance: Internal pipeline bug — not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: Improve MCP tool descriptions for RAG search quality
issues.relevance: RAG tool discovery — not applicable to ARC-1 intent-based routing.

issues.title: feat: return SearchObjects results in TSV format
issues.relevance: This was issue #40 being closed — same as #40.

issues.title: feat: return SearchObjects results in TSV format instead of XML
issues.relevance: Search result payload optimization — TSV format reduces token consumption vs XML/JSON. ARC-1 SAPSearch uses text format already, but TSV columns could be more structured.

issues.title: fix: compact SearchObject XML response to reduce payload size
issues.relevance: Intermediate step before #40 TSV. ARC-1 already uses text format.

issues.title: GetPackageTree returns OK with empty tree for non-existent packages
issues.relevance: Error handling for missing packages. Verify ARC-1 getPackageContents.

issues.title: Handlers don't pass logger to createAdtClient
issues.relevance: Logging infrastructure fix. Not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: shared:setup does not activate BDEF
issues.relevance: Test infrastructure fix.

issues.title: BDEF test leaves object locked on failure
issues.relevance: BDEF lock cleanup on failure. ARC-1 uses try-finally but verify BDEF specifically.

issues.title: Flaky: Domain create fails intermittently on BTP trial (description missing)
issues.relevance: BTP trial flakiness. Not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: test: TransportedObjectCrud fails — E77 transport configured for E19 system
issues.relevance: Test infrastructure issue specific to their multi-system setup. Not relevant.

issues.title: test: FunctionLow/HighHandlers fail — FUGR locked in transport
issues.relevance: FUGR lock conflict in tests. Not relevant to ARC-1.

issues.title: fix: RuntimeRunClassWithProfiling returns stale trace ID
issues.relevance: Profiler trace timing issue. ARC-1 SAPDiagnose traces action may have similar edge case — worth a mental note but low priority.

issues.title: Extend MCP tools for Object History and Transport Requests
issues.relevance: Object history (version list, diff) + transport contents (E071). ARC-1 lacks both. Transport contents is Medium priority in feature matrix (#20). Object history/CompareSource is #25 in matrix.

issues.title: Writing ABAP Program into SAP
issues.relevance: User help request — not a feature or bug. ARC-1 already supports PROG write.

issues.title: Replace node-rfc with @mcp-abap-adt/sap-rfc-lite
issues.relevance: RFC migration. ARC-1 is HTTP-only.

issues.title: feat: add HTTPS/TLS support for MCP server
issues.relevance: TLS/HTTPS support — Critical gap in ARC-1 feature matrix. Study their implementation approach (--tls-cert, --tls-key, --tls-ca).

issues.title: Verify enableAcceptCorrection is enabled for all ADT client instances
issues.relevance: Content-Type auto-correction — this is the enableAcceptCorrection pattern that fixes 415 errors. ARC-1 should implement similar 415 auto-retry (Critical #3 in matrix).

issues.title: fix: give SAP_AUTH_TYPE priority over SAP_JWT_TOKEN in test helpers
issues.relevance: Auth env var priority — verify ARC-1 config.ts doesn't have same issue.

issues.title: ListTransports fails with ExceptionResourceNotAcceptable: wrong Accept content type
issues.relevance: 415 Content-Type issue with transports endpoint. ARC-1 may hit this on older SAP systems. Need Accept header negotiation. Critical #3 in matrix.

issues.title: UpdateProgram: 415 on checkruns (auto-detect Content-Type) + guaranteed unlock on error
issues.relevance: Two issues: (1) 415 auto-retry needed — Critical for ARC-1. (2) try-finally unlock — ARC-1 already has this. The 415 pattern is the key takeaway.

issues.title: SearchObject tool description needs priority keywords for RAG discoverability
issues.relevance: RAG tool descriptions — ARC-1 uses intent routing, not embedding discovery.

issues.title: Improve tool descriptions for better vector RAG discoverability
issues.relevance: Same as #21 — RAG descriptions not relevant to intent-based architecture.

issues.title: llm-agent: healthCheck() should not call listTools() on MCP clients
issues.relevance: Internal MCP client health check design. Not relevant.

issues.title: Add lightweight health check endpoint (GET /mcp/health)
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has /health endpoint.

issues.title: fix: BDEF test resilience — delay after delete, guarantee unlock, transport in BIMPL
issues.relevance: Test infrastructure fix. Not relevant.

issues.title: fix: propagate SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE and pass transport_request in update tests
issues.relevance: Test infrastructure. Not relevant.

issues.title: feat: add SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE override and eager HTTP session init
issues.relevance: ARC-1 already has SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE with auto/btp/onprem.

issues.title: A mistake in CLINE_CONFIGURATION.md
issues.relevance: Docs typo. Not relevant.

issues.title: MCP error -32603: Error: New code check failed when connecting with DE language
issues.relevance: i18n check handling — non-EN languages cause check failures. ARC-1 should verify SAP_LANGUAGE handling in syntax check / ATC. Medium #13 in existing matrix.

issues.title: MCP error -32603: Error: SAP Error: Resource is not locked
issues.relevance: Lock sequencing issue. ARC-1 lock flow is different (explicit lock in crud.ts). Low risk.

issues.title: Not able to create or update. Reads are working.
issues.relevance: Transport request UX issue — user didn't know they needed to provide transport. ARC-1 has elicitation for this. Good validation of ARC-1's approach.

issues.title: Dump when changing with a wrong transport request number
issues.relevance: Error handling for bad transport numbers. ARC-1 should have clear error messages. Low — already good error handling in crud.ts.

issues.title: PREA was here — discovered mcp-abap-adt
issues.relevance: Community interaction, not a bug/feature.

issues.title: The tool GetTypeInfo does not return data for structures
issues.relevance: Structure fallback in type info. ARC-1 already returns structured metadata for STRU type.

issues.title: Correct processing of 409 error for all updating tools
issues.relevance: 409 conflict handling — ensure ARC-1 crud.ts returns clear conflict messages to LLM. Check if conflict details (lock holder, transport) are surfaced.

issues.title: Added error details from SAP for error 409 to improve LLM and human chance to solve the problem
issues.relevance: Same as #7 — 409 error detail extraction for LLM consumption. Verify ARC-1 AdtApiError includes full SAP error body.

issues.title: UpdateLocalTestClass sometimes gives error 409 without any details
issues.relevance: Duplicate of #3/#6. Already covered.

issues.title: The whole error returned by SAP added for CreateLocalTestClass
issues.relevance: PR for #3. Already covered in #6/#7.

issues.title: CreateLocalTestClass sometimes gives error 409 without any details
issues.relevance: Original 409 report. Covered by #6/#7.

issues.title: Comments in .env file are not supported
issues.relevance: Inline .env comment parsing. ARC-1 uses dotenv which handles this correctly. No action needed.
